title: Look up project by Spanish mobile number and continue in project flow
description: Verifies a customer can enter a valid Spanish mobile number on the home page and is redirected into their project so they can continue the multi-step form.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 600000001 into the phone number field
Submit the phone number lookup
Verify the user is redirected into a project identified by an ELT project code and the multi-step project flow is shown

title: Submit completed project from review and see confirmation
description: Verifies that a customer can reach review, submit the project, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Advance through the flow, completing any required steps encountered until reaching the review section
Submit the project
Verify a success confirmation is visible indicating the project was submitted

title: Assessor logs in to access the dashboard project list
description: Verifies an assessor can log in with the correct password and see the list of submitted projects.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard shows a list of submitted projects

title: Dashboard login and open a submitted project detail
description: Verifies that an assessor can log into the dashboard, open a submitted project, and see extracted data and document previews.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the password field with eltex2025
Submit the dashboard login form
Open a project from the project list
Verify extracted fields and uploaded document previews are displayed on the project detail page

title: Use review checklist to navigate to an incomplete item and return completed
description: Verifies that a customer can jump from review to fix an incomplete item and then return to review with the item marked complete.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Advance through the flow until reaching the review section
Select an incomplete checklist item to navigate to its section
Complete the required actions in that section until it is complete
Return to the review section using the normal forward navigation
Verify all checklist items are marked as complete and the submission action is available

title: Complete required legal signatures for a signing-required province
description: Verifies that a customer in a province that requires signing can complete all required signatures with PDF previews and proceed to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Advance through the flow until reaching the legal document signing step
Select Cataluña as the province if a province selection is presented in the flow
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to the current required document
Repeat drawing and applying signatures until all required documents for the province are signed
Proceed to the next step
Verify the signing section is marked as completed and the user is taken to the next section of the project flow

title: Complete property document uploads with AI review and proceed to province selection
description: Verifies a customer can upload all required property documents, review extracted fields, and proceed to province selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a valid DNI/NIE front image using the identity document upload control
Confirm the displayed extracted identity fields
Upload a valid IBI document file using the IBI upload control
Upload one or more electricity bill page files using the electricity bill upload control
Proceed to the next step
Verify the province selection step is displayed

title: Assessor opens a project to review uploaded documents and extracted data
description: Verifies an assessor can open a project from the list and view document previews and extracted fields on the project detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click a project in the submitted project list
Verify uploaded document previews are displayed
Verify extracted data fields are displayed

title: Dashboard download ZIP for a project
description: Verifies that an assessor can initiate downloading a ZIP package for a project from the project detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the password field with eltex2025
Submit the dashboard login form
Open a project from the project list
Initiate the ZIP download for the project
Verify a download has been initiated by the browser

title: Auto-resume directly into energy certificate when project is pre-seeded
description: Verifies that a pre-seeded project loads and resumes at the energy certificate section without manual navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250005
Verify the energy certificate section is the current active section when the project loads

title: Select a signing-required province and proceed to the signing step
description: Verifies the customer can select a province that requires signing and the flow continues into the representation/signing step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Select Cataluña as the province
Proceed to the next step
Verify the legal representation or signing step is displayed

title: Assessor downloads the ZIP archive for a project
description: Verifies an assessor can initiate downloading a project ZIP from the project detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click a project in the submitted project list
Click the control to download the project ZIP
Verify a download is initiated for a ZIP archive

title: Dashboard logout re-protects access to projects
description: Verifies that after logging out, the dashboard routes are protected and require logging in again to view project data.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the password field with eltex2025
Submit the dashboard login form
Log out of the dashboard
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the dashboard shows the login form instead of the project list

title: Skip signing when province requires no signatures
description: Verifies that selecting a province with zero required signatures skips the signing step and allows the customer to continue.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002
Advance through the flow until the province selection is available
Select a province that requires no signatures
Proceed forward in the flow
Verify the signing step is not required and the user can continue to the energy certificate or review section

title: Assessor cannot access the dashboard with an incorrect password
description: Verifies an assessor entering an incorrect password is blocked from accessing the dashboard and sees an inline error.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation error is visible

title: Prevent submission when checklist has incomplete required items
description: Verifies that the review step blocks submission when required items are incomplete and indicates what must be fixed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Advance through the flow until reaching the review section without completing all required steps
Attempt to submit the project
Verify a validation state is visible indicating required items are incomplete and submission does not complete

title: Complete energy certificate survey end-to-end with signature and finalize
description: Verifies that a customer can complete all four energy certificate steps, sign, finalize, and see the certificate marked as completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Advance to the energy certificate section if it is not already the active section
Fill valid values for cadastral reference, habitable area, floor count, and bedroom count
Proceed to the next survey step
Fill valid door and window counts for all orientations
Proceed to the next survey step
Select valid window frame material, glass type, and shutter presence options
Proceed to the next survey step
Select valid options for thermal installation type, boiler fuel, air conditioning type, and heating emitter type
Select valid values for product sold and customer status questions
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Finalize the energy certificate
Verify the energy certificate step is marked as completed and the flow can continue to the review step

title: Assessor logs out and the dashboard becomes protected again
description: Verifies logging out ends the session and the dashboard requires the password again to access.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the control to log out
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the dashboard login form is displayed

title: Select a non-signing province and skip directly past signing
description: Verifies selecting a province that does not require signing bypasses the signing step and proceeds to the next applicable step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002
Navigate through the flow until province selection is shown
Select a province that requires zero signatures
Proceed to the next step
Verify the flow advances to the next applicable step without showing a signing step

title: Block progress when signatures are incomplete
description: Verifies that the customer cannot proceed past the signing step until all required signatures for the selected province are completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Advance through the flow until reaching the legal document signing step
Select Cataluña as the province if a province selection is presented in the flow
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to only the first required document
Attempt to proceed to the next step without completing remaining required signatures
Verify an incomplete-signature validation error is visible and the user remains on the signing step

title: Assessor exports the project list as CSV
description: Verifies an assessor can export the dashboard project list as a CSV file.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the control to export the project list as CSV
Verify a download is initiated for a CSV file

title: Skip energy certificate and continue to review
description: Verifies that the customer can skip the energy certificate survey and the certificate is marked as skipped while allowing progress to review.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Advance to the energy certificate section if it is not already the active section
Choose to skip the energy certificate survey
Proceed forward in the flow
Verify the energy certificate step is marked as skipped and the user can access the review step

title: Dashboard export CSV from project list
description: Verifies that an assessor can export project data as a CSV from the dashboard list view.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill in the password field with eltex2025
Submit the dashboard login form
Initiate the CSV export from the dashboard list view
Verify a download has been initiated by the browser

title: Require DNI back when front-only card is detected before proceeding
description: Verifies the customer cannot proceed after uploading a DNI front-only card image unless the required DNI back image is also uploaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a DNI front image that the app treats as a front-only card
Attempt to proceed to the next step without uploading the DNI back image
Verify a validation error indicates the DNI back image is required and the user cannot advance

title: Validate required fields prevent advancing in energy certificate step 1
description: Verifies that leaving required step-1 energy certificate fields empty prevents advancing and shows validation errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Advance to the energy certificate section if it is not already the active section
Clear any prefilled values in the step-1 required fields if present
Attempt to proceed to the next survey step
Verify required-field validation errors are visible and the user remains on step 1

title: Allow re-signing a document before proceeding
description: Verifies that the customer can redraw and reapply a signature for a document and still complete the signing step successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Advance through the flow until reaching the legal document signing step
Select Madrid or Valencia as the province if a province selection is presented in the flow
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to the current document
Draw a new signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the new signature again for the same document
Complete the remaining required document signatures and proceed
Verify the signing section is completed and the user can continue to the next step

title: Require signature before finalizing the energy certificate
description: Verifies that the customer cannot finalize the energy certificate without providing a signature.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Advance to the energy certificate section if it is not already the active section
Complete all required survey steps with valid selections without drawing a signature
Attempt to finalize the energy certificate
Verify a signature-required validation error is visible and the certificate is not marked as completed

title: Require signature input before applying to a document
description: Verifies that attempting to apply a signature without drawing one shows a validation state and does not mark the document as signed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Advance through the flow until reaching the legal document signing step
Select Madrid or Valencia as the province if a province selection is presented in the flow
Attempt to apply a signature without drawing on the signature pad canvas
Verify a signature-required validation error is visible and the current document remains unsigned

title: Show error when phone number is unrecognized or invalid
description: Verifies a customer entering an unrecognized or invalid phone number sees an inline error and is not redirected to a project.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 123 into the phone number field
Submit the phone number lookup
Verify an inline validation or not-found error is visible and the user remains on the phone entry step
